message: feat: multi-theme system, multi-device auth, iOS & UI polish
body:
- Add 3 switchable UI styles: Brutalist / Zen Garden / Aurora Glass
- Add style switcher in settings page (界面风格 dropdown)
- Sync theme attrs in <head> for correct loading screen style
- Multi-token auth: support up to 10 concurrent device sessions
- iOS: disable pinch-zoom and auto-zoom on input focus
- Header & sidebar toggle: unified rounded-square button style
- Content area: top mask-image fade on scroll
- Nav items: use CSS variable border-radius, remove hardcoded glow
- Remove header box-shadow and ::after gradient across all themes
